summary: P2-FIN User Finance Screens Testing Complete. All 3 user finance pages working correctly. Backend APIs verified with curl and pytest. Frontend UI tested with Playwright. E2E flows for PDF download and subscription cancel/reactivate working.

minor.issue: Initial auth requests sometimes timeout due to network latency - subsequent requests work fine

issues: React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<option>/<select> - cosmetic only, functionality works

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testids present and working correctly across all 3 finance pages
Invoice list sorted by issued_at/created_at DESC (newest first) - verified
Status badges using FinanceStatusBadge component with proper color mapping
Empty state messages use formal/corporate tone as required
PDF download triggers browser file download correctly
Subscription cancel/reactivate use confirmation modal - no direct execution without confirm click
Ownership enforcement working - 403 returned for foreign invoice access
seed_data_creation: Created subscription for user@platform.com (id: 523b186d-f137-49e6-a7ce-0ee6f9ee4032) with DryRun Plan for testing cancel/reactivate flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 User Finance screens complete. All 3 pages (/account/invoices, /account/payments, /account/subscription) working. Test user has active subscription for testing. Invoice list has 18 items, 1 with PDF available. Admin finance regression tests pass.

P2-FIN-U-02_AccountPayments.history_render: PASS - table structure correct (0 records for test user)
P2-FIN-U-02_AccountPayments.empty_state: PASS - formal message: 'Henüz ödeme kaydı bulunmamaktadır.'
P2-FIN-U-02_AccountPayments.no_pii_leak: PASS - normalized_message used instead of raw data

P2-FIN-U-03_AccountSubscription.active_plan_display: PASS - shows plan name, price, currency
P2-FIN-U-03_AccountSubscription.empty_state: PASS - formal message when no subscription
